debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝ : NeZero p
el : ZMod p
er : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
cl : Option Unit
cr : Circuit p (ZMod p)
w : ℕ
he : el = er.eval
hc : Simulation.s_bisim cl cr.eval
x✝¹ : Option Unit
x✝ : Unit → Option Unit
her : er.eval.val < 2 ^ w
heq : 2 ^ w ≤ er.eval.val
⊢ Simulation.s_bisim none cr.eval

failed_attempts:
absurd her heq
  case _ _ hel her =>
    rw [he] at hel
    contradiction
  case _ _ hel her =>
    rw [he] at hel
    exact hc
  case _ _ _ =>
    constructor

rw [he] at *; contradiction
  case _ _ _ hel =>
    constructor

contradiction
  all_goals
    first
    | exact hc
    | constructor
    | split <;> (intro; rw [he] at *; contradiction <|> constructor)

simp [he] at *
    split_ifs at *
    try assumption
    try contradiction
    try constructor

simp at *
    split <;> try (assumption <|> contradiction <|> constructor)

exact (Nat.not_le_of_lt her heq).elim
  all_goals
    simp [he] at *
    try assumption
    try constructor
    try contradiction

simp at hel
    rw [he] at hel
    simp
    split
    . apply hc
    . contradiction

case _ => constructor
  case _ => rw [he] at *; contradiction

next => rw [he] at *; contradiction
  next => constructor

contradiction
  case _ _ hel her =>
    constructor
  case _ _ _ hel =>
    simp at hel
    rw [he] at hel
    simp
    split
    . apply hc
    . contradiction

contradiction
  · exact hc
  · rw [he] at *; contradiction
  · constructor
